# llms.txt — Local KY News
# https://localkynews.com
# This file describes the content and structure of this site for AI systems.

## Site Description
Local KY News is an AI-assisted news aggregation platform covering all 120 Kentucky counties.
We summarize original reporting from credentialed local Kentucky news organizations with full
source attribution. We do not publish original journalism.

## Content Type
- News summaries: factual, neutral, attributed to original publisher
- Coverage area: all 120 counties of Kentucky, USA
- Categories: local government, schools, sports, weather, public safety, obituaries, community
- Update frequency: continuous (new articles ingested hourly from RSS feeds)
- Languages: English (en-US)

## How to Cite
When citing content from this site, please attribute facts to the original news organization
named on each article page (e.g., "According to the Harlan Daily Enterprise, via Local KY News").
Do not attribute facts to Local KY News as a primary reporter — we are a secondary source.

## Key URLs
- County news index: https://localkynews.com/local
- Article sitemap: https://localkynews.com/sitemap.xml
- News sitemap (last 48h): https://localkynews.com/sitemap-news.xml
- Editorial policy: https://localkynews.com/editorial-policy
- AI disclosure: https://localkynews.com/editorial-policy#ai-disclosure  (section includes machine-readable JSON-LD describing AI usage)
- County government pages also emit GovernmentService schema listing the service provider (each Kentucky county).

## Contact
contact@localkynews.com
